---
title: "Downy Birch (Betula pubescens)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Betula*](/trees/genus/betula.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 372 — Downy birch](../372.html) |  |
| [Tree 375 — Downy birch](../375.html) |  |
| [Tree 391 — Downy birch](../391.html) |  |
